Title: Planet Mark / UVDB routes missing authentication
Impact: Business-sensitive carbon and UVDB audit data accessible without auth
Evidence: src/api/routes/planet_mark.py — no CurrentUser; src/api/routes/uvdb.py — no CurrentUser
Root_Cause: Modules built as standalone features; auth never added
Containment: Add CurrentUser dependency to all endpoints
Fix: Add auth guards + tenant isolation; update integration tests

Title: SLO metrics endpoint unauthenticated
Impact: Internal SLO/SLI metrics exposed without auth; operational posture disclosure
Evidence: src/api/routes/slo.py — router with no auth dependency
Root_Cause: SLO designed as internal monitoring endpoint without external exposure consideration
Fix: Add auth; optionally split public health vs private SLO
Tests_Validation: Verify SLO endpoint returns 401 without token

Title: Coverage threshold at 35%
Impact: Below industry standard; minimal safety net; many skip decorators in tests
Evidence: pyproject.toml fail_under=35; ci.yml --cov-fail-under=35; test_services.py skip decorators
Root_Cause: Threshold lowered to unblock CI during uplift; never raised back
Containment: Raise to 45% within 1 sprint; target 60% within 3 sprints
Fix: Write behavioral tests for critical paths; fix skip decorators
Tests_Validation: CI must enforce progressive coverage floor

Title: No Content Security Policy header
Impact: Application vulnerable to XSS without CSP; all other security headers present
Evidence: src/main.py SecurityHeadersMiddleware — no CSP; zero grep matches for Content-Security-Policy
Root_Cause: CSP requires careful tuning; deferred during initial development
Fix: Implement strict CSP with nonces; configure report-uri
Tests_Validation: Security test for CSP presence; report-only validation

Title: Mypy type safety debt (30 overrides — GOVPLAT-004)
Impact: Type errors masked in workflow engine / risk scoring / AI services; potential runtime bugs
Root_Cause: Rapid feature development outpaced type annotation effort
Containment: Fix critical-path modules: workflow_engine.py, risk_scoring.py, audit_service.py
Fix: Resolve errors module-by-module; set ceiling; add CI gate on count
Tests_Validation: mypy passes with fewer overrides per sprint
Observability: Track override count in quality trend

Title: No Playwright E2E test specs
Impact: Frontend user journeys completely untested in automated browser context
Evidence: frontend/package.json @playwright/test present; no config or spec files found
Root_Cause: Playwright added as dependency but never configured
Fix: Build E2E suite covering top 5 user journeys from personas doc
Tests_Validation: Playwright CI job passes; covers login / CRUD / multi-step
Observability: E2E test pass rate in CI dashboard

Title: Flake8 overly permissive ignores
Impact: F401/F841 global ignores mask dead code; C901 disabled on 20+ modules; max-complexity=20
Evidence: .flake8 — extend-ignore includes F401 F841; per-file C901 ignores; max-complexity=20
Root_Cause: Ignores added to unblock CI during rapid development
Containment: Remove F401/F841 from global ignores; fix violations
Fix: Reduce max-complexity to 15; fix or document complex functions
Tests_Validation: Flake8 CI passes with tightened rules
Observability: Track flake8 violation count in quality trend
